hero.title: I help understand your personality and environment
hero.description: I analyze your natal chart as an exact data system: where your money lies, what is your true support, which scenarios block growth and how to use your natural formulas at 100%. These are just popular requests, your chart contains all the answers to any questions.

natalChart.title: What Does Chart Analysis Give?
natalChart.description1: A natal chart is a sacred passport of your soul, but not a verdict or predetermined fate. It's about your nature, your talents, your fears, your blocks.

description2.heading: Deep understanding of your personality
description2.description: How to find support in yourself and not go crazy when everything collapses.

description2.heading: Understanding relationship dynamics
description2.description: Your personal formulas for earning and scaling.

description2.heading: Clarity in career path
description2.description: Scenarios that you don't notice, but which eat up your resources and block growth.

description2.heading: Revelation of soul's purpose
description2.description: Understanding your cycles — when to act aggressively, and when to retreat into the shadows.

testimonial.text: "Dara, dear, I would like to thank you for such a luxurious analysis of my date. It really is such hard work - so many insights, so many tips: I received not just a consultation, but also a parallel practical course of actions. Just a bombastic combo: analysis, psychological therapy, motivation, expansion of thinking, and turning in the right direction. Thank you so much - I really appreciate it. I have good intuition: I jumped on the train in time, soon you won't be able to get to you."
testimonial.author: — Ekaterina, Saint Petersburg

services.title: My Services
services.subtitle: Choose a reading that resonates with you, and I will help you uncover the mysteries of your natal chart and guide you on the path of self-discovery and growth.

personalAnalysis.title: Personal Analysis
personalAnalysis.description: Personality and potential audit: complete unpacking of personality, analysis of temperament, financial blocks, strengths and karmic tasks. Instructions to yourself without esoteric water. Recommendations for resource recovery, suitable sports, strategies for personal development.

compatibility.title: Compatibility
compatibility.description: How you really see each other, I'll show what harmony looks like for each of you. Karmic ties, tension points and growth zones in the couple. I analyze both personal and business partnerships. Indeed, compatibility with a business partner is critically important for money, an unsuitable partner or employee can block profits.

solar.title: Solar
solar.description: Your personal navigator for the next 12 months. Which areas will require attention, where money will come from, in which area you will face crisis and stress, and where to step on the gas. The calculation is based on your current place of residence.

childAnalysis.title: Child Analysis
childAnalysis.description: Children's chart: development vector. Instructions for parents. The child's type of thinking and perception, how he absorbs information, which sections to give to not break nature, and how to build trust based on his (not your) basic settings.

financialPotential.title: Financial Analysis / Financial Potential
financialPotential.description:
Your money and scale algorithm.
Detailed analysis of the financial axis in your chart. How exactly do money come to you: through employment, freelancing or big business? Which spheres and niches will bring maximum income? We analyze your personal wealth formulas, blocking scenarios and growth points. Instructions for monetizing your potential.

businessAnalysis.title: Existing Business Analysis
businessAnalysis.description:
Business audit and prosperity strategy.
Business is a separate consciousness with its own character, mission and financial flow. I analyze your company's chart: how compatible it is with you as the creator, where its money is, what its strengths and hidden crises are. You will receive a clear strategy for positioning, scaling and crisis management.

rectification.title: Rectification (Short Reading)
rectification.description:
Restoration of birth time.
Accurate birth time is critically important for correct astrological analysis. If you know the time only approximately (or not at all), I will restore it to the minute based on significant events in your life (marriage, moves, surgeries, births of children). Without accurate time, the chart 'is silent'.

crisisExit.title: Crisis Exit Method (Short Reading)
crisisExit.description: Targeted analysis for those going through the most difficult age milestones: Saturn return (29-34 years) or Karmic Nodes return (36-38 years). Why is what seemed stable collapsing? Where is this crisis directing you? I will give clear recommendations on how to go through this period with minimal losses and reach a new level.

lunarAnalysis.title: Basic Comfort and Fears (Moon Analysis)
lunarAnalysis.description: Unpacking your safety zone. Short but fundamentally important analysis. The Moon in the chart is responsible for your basic comfort settings, unconscious fears, anxiety and ability to relax. Why do you burn out? Where does background anxiety come from? What blocks your financial potential at the subconscious level? You will receive keys to your nervous system and instructions on how to balance emotions. Perfect for first acquaintance with my method.

help.title: Don't know which reading to choose?
help.description: If this is your first time with me, I recommend starting with personal analysis. This will give you a deep understanding of yourself and help determine which aspects of your life need attention. If you want to know about the coming year, solar is an excellent choice. And for understanding relationship dynamics - compatibility will be ideal. If you have specific questions or are unsure what to choose, feel free to contact me for consultation.

about.title: About Me
about.name: Dara Yakupova
about.description1: I came to astrology in a state of deep crisis and searching for answers. It was this method that helped me rediscover myself, take responsibility for my own choices, and start acting exclusively towards growth. As a result, my life changed dramatically for the better.
about.description2: My approach is based on precise algorithms and deep structural analysis, combined with subtle, intuitive feeling of your chart.
about.description3: Important clarification: I do not engage in 'rescuing' and stroking the ego. I work only with those who have a real desire for self-knowledge and the courage to change their lives. I believe: if our paths crossed — it's not an accident. Therefore, if you have the readiness to dive into yourself, do not deprive yourself of this pleasure. Whether it's choosing a business niche, moving to another country, or getting out of a personal crisis — the chart has clear indications. My task is to translate the complex language of astrological algorithms into a clear and applicable action plan for you.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Ready to explore your astrological chart? Contact me directly via WhatsApp to discuss availability and book a session.

footer.description: Your chart contains all the answers to any questions.
